policy: Every lane: done backlog card must have ID-named verifier coverage or an explicit approved exception. Exceptions are visible loopholes, not hidden passes.

exceptions.reason: Historical done card predates the ID-named verifier coverage rule. It remains accepted only until a future cleanup adds direct verifier coverage or retires the card.
